title: Yale - Y121B/40/125/1 High Security 40mm Brass Padlock - Closed Boron Shackle - 3 Keys
features: DESIGNED FOR OUTDOOR USAGE: Helps you secure your shed, gate, shutter door or other high value outdoor items you need to keep safe
HIGH PROTECTION: 5 pin cylinder Brass closed shackle padlock with Boron shackle to prevent cutting and double locking for added security.

RIGOROUSLY TESTED: Tested to EN12320:2012 simulating forms of attack such as cutting, pulling and twisting of shackle. Also tested up to 96 hours for corrosion resistance to ensure protection against weather conditions with a CEN rating of 2.
DIMENSIONS: Body W: 46mmBody H: 70mmBody D: 20mmShackle Ø: 7 Weight:200g
EXCLUSIVE YALE DESIGN: With protective cover for additional weatherproof protection and a range of sizes from 40mm to 50mm for your security needs.
description: From the manufacturer Yale, inspired by the past, is creating the future of security. With 180 years of manufacturing expertise, we are introducing our padlocks with an exclusive Yale design and tested to EN12320:2012 standard for added security and reassurance, built with you in mind. Designed for outdoor usage Suitable for your garden shed, shutters or garden gates that you want to keep safe and secure. Yale takes care of your possessions; you take care of the rest. Extreme testing Tested to EN12320:2012 to simulate forms of attack such as cutting, twisting and pulling of shackle and tested up to 96 hours for corrosion resistance to withstand different weather conditions, for your peace of mind. Enhanced security Even that special bike can be kept safe and secure in your garage with a closed Boron shackle to prevent cutting, and double locking for added security, built with you in mind. Exclusive Yale design A range of different sizes available to suit your security needs. 40mm & 50mm Brass padlock closed shackle or with chrome finish 51 / 61 or 71mm Weatherproof padlock or Weatherproof padlock with closed shackle 30mm/40mm/50mm or 60mm Laminated steel padlock 40 / 50 / 60 or 70mm Chrome finish brass padlock with or without long shackle 50mm/60mm/70mm/80mm or 90mm Brass shutter padlocks Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,502 3.7 out of 5 stars 502 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,611 4.4 out of 5 stars 395 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,608 Price £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £12.98 £ 12 . 98 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £9.98 £ 9 . 98 £16.98 £ 16 . 98 Suitable for Outdoors, gates, sheds, ladders, shutter doors Outdoors, gates, sheds, ladders, shutter doors Outdoors, gates, sheds, ladders, shutter doors Outdoors, gates, sheds, ladders, shutter doors Outdoors, gates, sheds, ladders, shutter doors Tested to simulate forms of attack such as cutting, pulling and twisting of shackle ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Tested to 10,000 cycles for opening and closing of shackle ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Boron shackle for extra protection against cutting of the shackle ✓ X X ✓ X Hardened steel shackle to protect against cutting of shackle X ✓ ✓ X ✓ Double locking for added security ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ X Corrosion resistance (tested for protection against weather conditions) Up to 96 hours Up to 120 hours Up to 120 hours Up to 240 hours Up to 96 hours Protective cover on the body, shackle and key hole for additional weatherproof protection X ✓ X X X CEN rating 2 2-3 3 2-3 2-3 Keys 3 Keys 3 Keys 3 Keys 3 Keys 3 Keys
